title: T-009 LSP import and typing cleanup
summary: Clear the listed LSP typing debt in one scoped slice without broad workspace changes.
acceptance_criteria: The listed LSP imports and optional-access issues are fixed without widening to unrelated workspace behavior.
The focused LSP owner validation passes.
Touched Python files are Ruff-clean and Pyright-clean.
risks: LSP startup and document lifecycle changes can affect diagnostics and editor snapshot behavior.
This slice requires a language-server restart after merge because it touches src/sattlint_lsp/.
validation: & ".venv/Scripts/ruff.exe" check src/sattlint_lsp/server.py src/sattlint_lsp/_server_document.py tests/test_lsp_document.py tests/test_lsp_diagnostics.py tests/test_editor_api.py
